Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I need to go to the faculty office to complete[n]the paperwork for joining the student council.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I head to the faculty office right now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should introduce myself to the rest[n]of the student council now that I've joined.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I head to the student[n]council room right now?[n]{f 1 1}
